title: Error Envelope DTO
description: Canonical error response envelope (Shape A) returned for 4xx/5xx responses. FE consumes the top-level `message` / `error` fields directly. Domain-specific error bodies (e.g. billing/quota_exceeded) may keep their own schema; generic errors emit exactly this envelope.

success.description: Discriminator. Always false for error responses (success envelopes set this true).

message.description: Human-readable summary rendered by the client (e.g. toast text). Must be safe to display to end users.

error.description: Machine-readable error name the client can branch on. Stable, not a raw exception string.

error_code.description: Optional stable code for finer client branching (e.g. "quota_exceeded"). Distinct from `error`, which is the broad name.

details.description: Optional structured, client-safe diagnostic data. MUST NOT contain stack traces, SQL, raw exception strings, internal identifiers, column names, or any server internals — producers redact before populating. See validation_error_schema.json for the validation-specific shape.
